rationale: Close externalizes inline events to .ddx/attachments/<id>/events.jsonl, Events()/show --json transparently re-inline via LoadEventsInline, ExportTo inlines for bd/br interchange, ClosureGate accepts attached events, AppendEvent/Reopen handle both shapes, and TestAttachment* coverage exists.

findings.summary: Close path performs an extra full-store read+write to externalize after the status update; acceptable but doubles I/O on close. Could be folded into the same Update transaction in a follow-up.
Reopen pulls events back inline and removes the sidecar file but does not remove the attachment directory if empty; harmless cosmetic leftover.
